postCreateCommand:
\
    pipx install numpy && \
    mkdir -p ~/.vnc && \
    printf 'password
' | vncpasswd -f > ~/.vnc/passwd && chmod 600 ~/.vnc/passwd && \
    git clone https://github.com/novnc/noVNC.git && \
    # Start Tailscale daemon (first time) \
    sudo tailscaled --tun=userspace-networking --socks5-server=localhost:1055 & \
    sleep 3 && \
    # First-time login (requires browser confirmation once) \
    sudo tailscale up \
postStartCommand:
\
    # Start VNC \
    vncserver -xstartup "cinnamon-session" -rfbport 5900 && \
    ./noVNC/utils/novnc_proxy --vnc 127.0.0.1:5900 --listen localhost:6080 & \
    # Start Tailscale daemon \
    sudo tailscaled --tun=userspace-networking --socks5-server=localhost:1055 & \
    sleep 3 && \
    # Auto-login (no auth needed after first time) \
    sudo tailscale up \
